segments.speaker: Ivan Cossu
segments.text: Ivan Cossu is identified as co-founder of deskbird.

segments.speaker: Ivan Cossu
segments.text: Cossu says he and co-founder Jonas observed long-lasting changes in work patterns and conceived deskbird after a project day at BCG, where both had worked.

segments.speaker: Ivan Cossu
segments.text: He describes the initial concept as a marketplace for coworking spaces and the current product as B2B workplace-management software for hybrid companies.

segments.speaker: Ivan Cossu
segments.text: He says the company was almost bankrupt during the pandemic and changed from B2C to B2B nearly overnight in a 2021 product pivot.

segments.speaker: Ivan Cossu
segments.text: He explains that employees use deskbird to book desks and plan hybrid weeks, while administrators use occupancy statistics to adjust workspace and operating costs.

segments.speaker: Ivan Cossu
segments.text: He argues that the decisive success factor is selecting the right co-founders and employees.
